description: Persist a pending-blocked state and add the resolve-blocked / update --continue commit op — closes FGAP-080. When resyncSchema blocks, persist what the rollback currently discards (target schema body/version, the migration chain, the per-item failure set from TASK-048's diagnostic), and add a commit op mirroring resolve-conflict: re-validate the corrected block against the target schema, on success write the new schema via writeSchemaCheckedForDir and advance the merge base via stampBaselineFromBody — so the schema converges and stops re-blocking. The diagnose -> fix -> retry loop, end-to-end, matching the conflicts/resolve-conflict model.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Closes FGAP-080; advances STORY-006/011/012/014. Depends on TASK-048 (the persisted failure set is its diagnostic). Reuses stampBaselineFromBody, writeSchemaCheckedForDir, validateBlockWithMigrationForDir, the object store.
